From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Notre Dame (disambiguation)](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame_(disambiguation)&redirect=no "Notre Dame (disambiguation)"))

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Notre Dame](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Notre_Dame "wiktionary:Notre Dame")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**Notre Dame**, French for "Our Lady", a title of [Mary, mother of Jesus](/wiki/Mary,_mother_of_Jesus "Mary, mother of Jesus"), most commonly refers to:

* [Notre-Dame de Paris](/wiki/Notre-Dame_de_Paris "Notre-Dame de Paris"), a cathedral in Paris, France
* [University of Notre Dame](/wiki/University_of_Notre_Dame "University of Notre Dame"), a university in Indiana, United States
  + [Notre Dame Fighting Irish](/wiki/Notre_Dame_Fighting_Irish "Notre Dame Fighting Irish"), the university's athletics teams

**Notre Dame** may also refer to:

## Churches and cathedrals

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Churches and cathedrals")]

### Algeria

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Algeria")]

* [Notre-Dame d'Afrique](/wiki/Notre-Dame_d%27Afrique "Notre-Dame d'Afrique"), Algiers

### Cambodia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Cambodia")]

* [Notre Dame Cathedral (Phnom Penh)](/wiki/Notre_Dame_Cathedral_(Phnom_Penh) "Notre Dame Cathedral (Phnom Penh)")

### Canada

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Canada")]

* [Camp Val Notre-Dame](/wiki/Camp_Val_Notre-Dame "Camp Val Notre-Dame"), a recreational camp in Hérouxville, Mékinac Regional County Municipality, Mauricie, Quebec
* [Notre-Dame Basilica (Montreal)](/wiki/Notre-Dame_Basilica_(Montreal) "Notre-Dame Basilica (Montreal)"), in the historic district of Old Montreal
  + [Notre-Dame Church (Montreal)](/wiki/Notre-Dame_Church_(Montreal) "Notre-Dame Church (Montreal)") (1682–1830), historically in Old Montreal
* [Notre-Dame Basilica-Cathedral (Quebec City)](/wiki/Notre-Dame_Basilica-Cathedral_(Quebec_City) "Notre-Dame Basilica-Cathedral (Quebec City)"), the primate church of Canada
* [Notre-Dame Cathedral Basilica (Ottawa)](/wiki/Notre-Dame_Cathedral_Basilica_(Ottawa) "Notre-Dame Cathedral Basilica (Ottawa)"), an ecclesiastic basilica
* [Notre-Dame-de-Bon-Secours Chapel](/wiki/Notre-Dame-de-Bon-Secours_Chapel "Notre-Dame-de-Bon-Secours Chapel"), Montreal
* [Notre Dame Convent and Boarding School](/wiki/Notre_Dame_Convent_and_Boarding_School "Notre Dame Convent and Boarding School"), also known as Leipzig Convent, in Leipzig, Saskatchewan
* [Notre-Dame Street](/wiki/Notre-Dame_Street "Notre-Dame Street") in Montreal

### France

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: France")]

* [Basilica of Notre-Dame de Fourvière](/wiki/Basilica_of_Notre-Dame_de_Fourvi%C3%A8re "Basilica of Notre-Dame de Fourvière"), Lyon
* [Cathedral of Notre Dame, Amiens](/wiki/Cathedral_of_Notre_Dame,_Amiens "Cathedral of Notre Dame, Amiens")
* [Cathédrale Notre-Dame de Bayeux](/wiki/Cath%C3%A9drale_Notre-Dame_de_Bayeux "Cathédrale Notre-Dame de Bayeux")
* [Cathédrale Notre-Dame de Chartres](/wiki/Cath%C3%A9drale_Notre-Dame_de_Chartres "Cathédrale Notre-Dame de Chartres")

* [Cathédrale Notre-Dame de Rouen](/wiki/Cath%C3%A9drale_Notre-Dame_de_Rouen "Cathédrale Notre-Dame de Rouen")
* [Cathédrale Notre-Dame-de-Strasbourg](/wiki/Cath%C3%A9drale_Notre-Dame-de-Strasbourg "Cathédrale Notre-Dame-de-Strasbourg")

* [Notre-Dame de Guebwiller](/wiki/Notre-Dame_de_Guebwiller "Notre-Dame de Guebwiller")
* [Notre-Dame de Nice](/wiki/Notre-Dame_de_Nice "Notre-Dame de Nice")
* [Notre-Dame de Paris](/wiki/Notre-Dame_de_Paris "Notre-Dame de Paris")
* [Notre-Dame de Reims](/wiki/Notre-Dame_de_Reims "Notre-Dame de Reims")
* [Notre Dame des Cyclistes](/wiki/Notre_Dame_des_Cyclistes "Notre Dame des Cyclistes"), Labastide-d'Armagnac
* [Notre Dame du Haut](/wiki/Notre_Dame_du_Haut "Notre Dame du Haut"), Ronchamp
* [Church of Notre-Dame, Villeneuve-sur-Yonne](/wiki/Church_of_Notre-Dame,_Villeneuve-sur-Yonne "Church of Notre-Dame, Villeneuve-sur-Yonne")
* [Church of Notre-Dame de Dives-sur-Merent](/wiki/Church_of_Notre-Dame_de_Dives-sur-Merent "Church of Notre-Dame de Dives-sur-Merent")

### Haiti

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Haiti")]

* [Cathédrale Notre-Dame de Port-au-Prince](/wiki/Cath%C3%A9drale_Notre-Dame_de_Port-au-Prince "Cathédrale Notre-Dame de Port-au-Prince"), Cathedral of Our Lady of the Assumption

### Luxembourg

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Luxembourg")]

* [Notre-Dame Cathedral, Luxembourg](/wiki/Notre-Dame_Cathedral,_Luxembourg "Notre-Dame Cathedral, Luxembourg"), the Roman Catholic Cathedral of Luxembourg City

### United Kingdom

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: United Kingdom")]

* [Notre Dame de France](/wiki/Notre_Dame_de_France "Notre Dame de France"), London

### United States

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: United States")]

* [Basilica of the Sacred Heart, Notre Dame](/wiki/Basilica_of_the_Sacred_Heart,_Notre_Dame "Basilica of the Sacred Heart, Notre Dame"), Indiana
* [Church of Notre Dame (New York City)](/wiki/Church_of_Notre_Dame_(New_York_City) "Church of Notre Dame (New York City)"), a parish of the Roman Catholic Archdiocese of New York
* [Notre Dame de Chicago](/wiki/Notre_Dame_de_Chicago "Notre Dame de Chicago"), Chicago, Illinois

### Vietnam

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Vietnam")]

* [Saigon Notre-Dame Basilica](/wiki/Saigon_Notre-Dame_Basilica "Saigon Notre-Dame Basilica"), Ho Chi Minh City

## Organizations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Notre_Dame&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Organizations")]

* [Hospitalité Notre Dame de Lourdes](/wiki/Hospitalit%C3%A9_Notre_Dame_de_Lourdes "Hospitalité Notre Dame de Lourdes"), a Roman Catholic religious confraternity under the spiritual authority of the Bishop of Tarbes and Lourdes
* [School Sisters of Notre Dame](/wiki/School_Sisters_of_Notre_Dame "School Sisters of Notre Dame"), a worldwide order of Roman Catholic nuns devoted to education
* [Sisters of Notre Dame de Namur](/wiki/Sisters_of_Notre_Dame_de_Namur "Sisters of Notre Dame de Namur"), a Roman Catholic order of religious sisters dedicated to providing education to the poor
